G2424.definition: Jesus = 'Jehovah is salvation'; the Son of God, the Saviour of mankind, God incarnate

G2316.definition: God, a god, deity; the Supreme Divinity, the God of Israel

G25.definition: love, goodwill, benevolence; divine love, the love of God for humanity

G2532.definition: and, also, even, indeed, but; a primary particle, having a copulative and sometimes also a cumulative force

G3056.definition: word, speech, divine utterance, analogy; the Word -- the Second Person of the Trinity, before and after he became incarnate

G5485.definition: grace, kindness, favor, gratitude; the absolutely free expression of the loving kindness of God to men finding its only motive in the bounty and benevolence of the Giver

G4102.definition: faith, belief, trust, confidence; fidelity, faithfulness; conviction of the truth of anything, belief

G444.definition: a human being, man, person; mankind, humanity
